app_layout_loading_msg_1: It's okay, my hotspot sucks too.
app_layout_loading_msg_2: Your computer just needs time to cook
app_layout_mobile_not_ready: THIS SITE ISN'T READY FOR MOBILE YET.
app_layout_mobile_recommend_desktop: We recommend opening this on desktop.
app_home_card_desc_projects: Create projects, track your progress, and submit them for review!
app_home_card_desc_guides: Learn to build stuff with our guides!
app_home_card_desc_pinned_event: Track your progress for your pinned event!
app_home_card_desc_slack: Chat with other Horizons hackers in #horizons!
app_home_card_desc_shop: Spend your approved hours on rewards!
app_home_card_desc_community: See what's coming up in the community!
app_refer_share_link: Share this link with your friends
app_refer_sticker_reward: Refer 3 friends to get this exclusive sticker sheet:
app_refer_sticker_disclaimer: *Your friends must complete the onboarding flow
app_refer_switch_reward: Refer friends to earn tickets to win a chance to get a Nintendo Switch Lite.
app_refer_switch_disclaimer: *Your friends must verify their IDs through Hack Club Auth
app_refer_empty: No referrals yet. Share your link!
app_onboarding_step_intro: Hiiii! *ferret noises* We are the ferretlings! We're here to introduce you to Hack Club's Horizons!
app_onboarding_step_hackathons: We're running 7 hackathons across the world, and <u>you're invited!</u>
app_onboarding_step_choose_event: Choose which event you want to go to!
app_onboarding_step_built_before: Have you built a project before?
app_onboarding_hackatime_setup: Make sure to set up the Hackatime extension.
app_onboarding_create_project_desc: Fill out the following fields! You can put an existing project, or the idea for a new project.
app_onboarding_create_project_disclaimer: Don't worry, this doesn't have to be final, you can change all of this later!
app_onboarding_event_change_later: You can change which event you want to go to later!
app_onboarding_experience_no: No, this is my first time.
app_tutorial_intro_text: YAYAYA!! I'm so excited for you to build your first project!
app_tutorial_vscode_desc: VS Code is a popular IDE. You can use it for development!
app_tutorial_step2_subtitle: Pick a project you want to work on!
app_tutorial_guide_website_desc: Build and deploy your own personal website!
app_tutorial_guide_platformer_desc: Build a platformer game with Godot!
app_tutorial_guide_git_title: Learn how to set up git
app_tutorial_guide_git_desc: Set up git for your project!
app_tutorial_step2_continue_hint: Once you've figured out what type of project you want to make, hit continue!
app_tutorial_step3_desc: You don't need to have a completed project. You can just put an idea for a new project.
app_tutorial_step3_disclaimer: Don't worry, this doesn't have to be final, you can change all of this later!
